product_overview: Mithila Makhana is a dual-gateway e-commerce and B2B supply chain platform connecting Makhana producers in Bihar, India to US consumers and wholesalers. It offers a premium lifestyle D2C consumer portal with education, recipes, and subscription models, alongside a compliance-focused B2B wholesale portal featuring bulk ordering, sample kits, and certification vaults, all unified by a clear, trust-building homepage.
core_goals: Establish trust and transparency for US buyers in the international Makhana supply chain.
Provide a seamless dual-path user experience for both consumers and business buyers without confusion.
Enable convenient direct-to-consumer shopping with personalized product recommendations and subscription models.
Deliver a professional B2B portal ensuring FDA compliance, regulatory documentation access, and bulk order management.
Support private label branding opportunities for emerging food brands.
Achieve measurable revenue milestones with strong customer retention and conversion metrics within the first year.
key_features: Dual-Gateway Homepage with clear routing to Consumer and Business portals.
Consumer Portal featuring product discovery, snack personality quiz, recipe hub, shopping cart, subscription & save, and delivery ETA calculator.

Business Portal with compliance vault for downloadable certifications and lab reports, $50 business sample kit order flow with refund incentive, bulk pricing calculator, and real-time order tracking dashboard.
Private Label Portal offering custom branding configurator with logo upload, 3D mockups, minimum order quantity calculator, and quote generation.
User authentication with secure account management, role-based access, and social login options.
Global search functionality across products, recipes, and compliance documents.
Ethical sourcing tracker showcasing impact on Mithila farming families.
Referral program for D2C users to drive viral growth.
user_flow_summary: Homepage presents split-screen gateway; users select 'Shop for Myself' or 'Source for Business' guiding to respective portals.
D2C Consumer takes a snack personality quiz leading to personalized product recommendations and can subscribe with recurring delivery and discounts.
B2B buyers access compliance vault, order $50 sample kits through a streamlined form and payment, try samples offline, then use bulk pricing calculator to request quotes and place bulk orders.
Private label users configure custom branding options, preview 3D mockups, approve quotes, and manage production timelines.
Users register and log in securely; B2C and B2B have tailored dashboards for order history, subscription management, and sample kit tracking.
Users utilize global search to find products, recipes, and compliance documents efficiently.
validation_criteria: Homepage clearly shows dual gateway with working navigation buttons directing users appropriately.
Snack personality quiz completes and returns accurate product recommendations.
Subscription model applies 15% discount and allows user controls like pause and cancel.
Compliance vault contains downloadable, filterable certifications and lab reports updated and accessible within 2 seconds.
Business sample kit order flow validates inputs, processes $50 payment, and confirms order with automated email.
Bulk pricing calculator updates dynamically with quantity input and generates correct pricing tiers with quote emails.
Order tracking dashboard provides real-time status updates with notifications on key shipment stages.
Private label configurator generates accurate 3D mockups and enforces minimum order quantities.
Authentication handles registration, login, password reset, and role-based access securely with email verification.
Search returns relevant results quickly with filters and autocomplete suggestions.
Referral program tracks referrals and applies credits correctly to associated accounts.
Platform meets performance benchmarks: page loads <2 seconds, API responses <500ms, uptime 99.9%.
